pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes this latitude into /home/ga/Desktop/usgs_alert.txt for the agent to use.
setup_task.sh explicitly writes this longitude into /home/ga/Desktop/usgs_alert.txt for the agent to use.
setup_task.sh alert text states 'Expected Magnitude: ~ M 7.5'. A minimum magnitude threshold of 7.0 is logical for verifying a successful magnitude computation of this real event.
export_result.sh checks for OUTPUT_PATH='/home/ga/recovered_event.xml', matching the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses real miniSEED waveform data from the GE network for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. setup_task.sh drops a text file (/home/ga/Desktop/usgs_alert.txt) explicitly instructing the agent to create an Artificial Origin at Lat 37.498, Lon 137.242, with a depth of 10 km. The task expects the agent to calculate a magnitude from the real data (resulting in a value >= 7.0) and export the recovered event to /home/ga/recovered_event.xml. export_result.sh queries the database for the final magnitude and checks for the presence of the exact output XML file.
